O0100I1 Special Treatments/Programs: Transfusion Pre-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received transfusions within the last 14 days while not a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) discontinued 09/30/2023
